commit.message:
Fix boolean/integer compatibility for PostgreSQL

SQLite stores booleans as 0/1 integers while PostgreSQL uses native
true/false. This caused template apply to fail with 500 on Railway.

- Change AccountRow.is_system type to number | boolean
- Use !!row.is_system instead of row.is_system === 1 for reads
- Use true/false instead of 1/0 for boolean writes
- Replace hardcoded 0 with ? placeholder in createAccount SQL

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: prevent nav/sidebar content poisoning team news results

Two root causes:
1. Scraping a Zero Hanger article fetched the full page HTML including the
   site nav which lists all 18 teams — causing every article to match every
   team, and filling summaries with menu garbage
2. article_mentions_team() was checking the full scraped summary, so the
   nav text "ADELAIDE Adelaide Crows... BRISBANE Brisbane Lions..." matched
   every team to every article

Fixes:
- Replace _html_to_text() with _extract_wp_article_body() which strips all
  nav/sidebar/widget elements before extracting paragraphs, and skips
  paragraphs with >40% all-caps words (nav menu pattern)
- Add match_text field to article dicts = title + original RSS excerpt only
  (never the scraped body) — used exclusively for team matching
- Update both article_mentions_team() call sites to use match_text, falling
  back to title-only when match_text is absent
- Remove full-article fetching from _scrape_zerohanger_html_page() — listing
  page excerpts are clean enough; full article fetches were the source of junk

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat: pageload1 uses plain HTTP to match browser1 (no TLS overhead)

pageload1 was using HTTPS (6 TLS handshakes) while browser1 used plain HTTP,
causing a 6x performance gap that made the comparison unfair. Now pageload1
rewrites HTTPS→HTTP with port mapping (8443→8080, 443→80), matching browser1.

Also removes the TLS-gap observation from HTML report (no longer needed).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

repository.name: networker-tester
repository.description: Cross-platform network diagnostics tool: TCP, HTTP/1.1, HTTP/2, HTTP/3, UDP telemetry with SQL Server storage and HTML reports

commit.message:
Wire dashboard to live API, add PostgreSQL migration support

Dashboard changes:
- Replace all mock/hardcoded data with real SDK calls
- Add @ledge/sdk dependency and transpilePackages config
- Create shared SDK client singleton (src/lib/ledge.ts)
- Add server actions for data fetching/mutations (src/lib/actions.ts)
- Server components fetch data, client components handle interactivity
- All data pages use force-dynamic rendering
- Cursor-based pagination on transactions page
- Account code/name lookup for line item display
- Statement sections with currentPeriod amounts and plainLanguageSummary

API fixes for PostgreSQL deployment:
- Add PostgreSQL migration support at boot (was SQLite-only)
- Auto-detect schema existence, apply 001_initial_schema.sql if needed
- Add 'updated' to audit_action enum for PostgreSQL
- Seed system user for admin operations

Engine fixes:
- Auto-create user records in createLedger when ownerId doesn't exist
- Auto-create user records in createApiKey when userId doesn't exist
- Fixes foreign key constraint violations on PostgreSQL

All 235 tests pass (core: 129, api: 35, mcp: 36, sdk: 35).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add comprehensive README

entry point with @hono/node-server. Setup and deploy shell scripts.

commit.message:
feat(web): add SSR/SEO, content moderation, and HTML export (Phase 5, Tasks 5.3-5.5)

Task 5.3 — SEO: SSR stack permalinks with OG meta tags, Twitter Cards,
JSON-LD structured data. Auto-generated sitemap.xml and robots.txt.
Thumbnail stub endpoint. 10 SEO tests.

Task 5.4 — Moderation: Text scanner (profanity, caps, URL spam) with
word-boundary-aware matching. Moderation queue with approve/reject/report
endpoints. Integrated into gallery publish flow (high=reject, medium=queue,
clean=publish). 16 moderation tests.

Task 5.5 — HTML Export: Self-contained offline HTML file with embedded
stack data, canvas preview, and proper XSS escaping. Export API endpoint
with Content-Disposition header. 17 export tests.

304 tests total (9 types + 215 renderer + 80 web).

Bumps the npm_and_yarn group with 1 update in the / directory: [simple-git](https://github.com/steveukx/git-js/tree/HEAD/simple-git).


Updates `simple-git` from 3.30.0 to 3.32.3
- [Release notes](https://github.com/steveukx/git-js/releases)
- [Changelog](https://github.com/steveukx/git-js/blob/main/simple-git/CHANGELOG.md)
- [Commits](https://github.com/steveukx/git-js/commits/simple-git@3.32.3/simple-git)

---
updated-dependencies:

  dependency-version: 3.32.3

  dependency-group: npm_and_yarn
...

Signed-off-by: dependabot[bot] <support@github.com>

* Update dependencies (#46)

https://claude.ai/code/session_01BX36JDyNAxTJeDbbYFzUDb

Co-authored-by: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: dependabot[bot] <support@github.com>
Co-authored-by: dependabot[bot] <49699333+dependabot[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Riya Amemiya <riya-amemiya+github@tokidux.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

Move Mini Games filter to first position in /learn filter bar

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: resolve issue #17 (description loss), #16 (working folder), and mobile LAN rendering

- Fix #17: AI-generated agent descriptions are now immediately persisted
  via updateNode + saveNode in handleGenerate, bypassing the autosave
  debounce timer that could lose data when clicking away quickly.

- Fix #16: Add project folder picker in Settings panel. Users can now
  browse to any folder to load agents/skills from that project's .claude/
  directory. The chosen path persists across restarts via ~/.aui/settings.json.
  Includes "Reset to Home" button to revert to default behavior.

- Fix mobile LAN: LAN mode syncFullState was sending nodes as a Record
  (object) while the mobile client expected an array. Changed to send an
  array matching cloud mode format. Added defensive Array.isArray check
  in app.js to handle both formats.

- v0.8.5: Persistent device pairing, relay protocol enhancements,
  improved mobile UI with PWA support

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix dashboard FavoriteCard: whole card clickable, SVG heart in thumbnail, no play button

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(web): add Preact SPA shell and Hono API server (Phase 5, Tasks 5.1+5.2)

Frontend: Vite + Preact SPA with client-side routing — editor, player,
gallery, learn, and legal pages. Editor mounts canvas with WildCardApp.
Legal page includes all required Apple trademark disclaimers.

Backend: Hono API with stack CRUD, gallery (paginated), auth stubs,
security headers (CSP, X-Frame-Options, etc.), and PostgreSQL schema DDL.
33 API tests covering all routes and error cases.

Review fixes applied: restricted CORS, extracted shared errorJson/parseJsonBody
helpers (DRY), fixed DELETE double-param, added slug collision detection,
added DB indexes and ON DELETE cascades.

commit.message:
Refactor run_hra_models into focused modules and clean up repo

Split the 670-line monolith into biomodels_fetch, species_names,
sbml_utils, plotting, and model_ids modules. Remove dead code from
copasi_process.py (CopasiSteadyStateStep, CopasiUTCProcess, etc.).
Clean up pyproject.toml: drop unused deps, add requests, fix package
includes. Make model ID list configurable via CLI args or function param.

commit.message:
Add thumbnail for Word Search – Dwarf Planets

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Show full post cards in check-in history (#40)

* Fix 6 contract failures: double-wrap and partial user selects

Found via new API contract test script that validates every endpoint
returns the exact JSON shape iOS expects.

Fixes:
- checkins controller: return result.data array (not {data, total})
- restaurants checkins controller: same fix
- comments author hydration: include isPrivate, followerCount,
  followingCount, postCount in select (iOS User model requires them)
- notifications actor hydration: same expanded select
- Add scripts/api-contract-test.ts that logs in, hits every endpoint,
  and validates response shapes match iOS Codable models

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Exclude scripts/ from nest build to fix deploy crash

The api-contract-test.ts in scripts/ was being included in the nest
build, causing compilation failure and missing dist/main.js in prod.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Instagram-level speed, quality, check-in flow & video support

Performance:
- Add Nuke image caching (100MB memory + 300MB disk) with LazyImage
- Add blurhash placeholders for colored loading states
- Enable gzip compression for all API responses
- Add missing DB indexes (post.authorId, notification compound, follow reverse)
- Bump image quality: medium 1080px/q85, thumb 600px/q80, original 2048px/q92
- Add image prefetching for next 5 posts in feed scroll

Check-in flow:
- Restaurant selection is now mandatory for every post
- Rename "New Post" to "Check In" throughout (tab, nav title, buttons)
- Auto-create check-in record linked to post on creation

Video support (10s Reels-style):
- Backend: FFmpeg video processing (transcode to H.264 1080p, extract thumbnail)
- Backend: Accept video MIME types (mp4, quicktime, mov) up to 50MB
- iOS: Video selection from PhotosPicker with auto-thumbnail generation
- iOS: Auto-play muted video in feed with loop and mute toggle
- iOS: HEIC upload support (0.92 quality, fallback JPEG)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add FFmpeg to Dockerfile for video processing in production

The @ffmpeg-installer/ffmpeg npm package may not work on Alpine's musl libc,
so install system ffmpeg via apk as a reliable fallback.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix 3 Xcode build errors: Nuke API and actor isolation

- Remove isDeduplicationEnabled (not in this Nuke version, on by default)
- Simplify LazyImage in RestaurantDetailView to avoid main-actor isolation error

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add @MainActor to coverImageSection to fix actor isolation error

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Inline cover image LazyImage to fix actor isolation cascade

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix 400 error: auto-create restaurant when place has no DB match

PlacePickerView uses Apple Maps (MKLocalSearch) which always returns
restaurantId: nil. Since restaurantId is now required on the backend,
auto-create the restaurant via POST /restaurants before creating the post.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix 4 issues: feed crash, video unmute, comments, shimmer placeholders

- Fix durationSecs decimal→string crash by adding TypeORM transformer
- Fix video unmute button swallowed by NavigationLink (.buttonStyle)
- Fix comments not loading: send page/perPage instead of limit param
- Add Instagram-style shimmer loading placeholders for images/video

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add ShimmerView.swift to Xcode project to fix CI build

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add multi-image carousel, profile error states, pull-to-refresh, dark mode toggle

- MediaCarouselView: swipeable TabView with page dots for multi-image posts
- PostCardView: replace single image + "+X more" with full carousel
- ProfileView: add .refreshable, error state with retry via EmptyStateView
- AppearanceManager: system/light/dark mode with @AppStorage persistence
- SettingsView: segmented picker for appearance mode
- InvlogApp: wire AppearanceManager with .preferredColorScheme

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add social features: bookmarks, share, stories, and DMs

Backend (NestJS):
- BookmarksModule: bookmark/unbookmark posts, list saved posts (cursor paginated)
- StoriesModule: create story from media, 24h expiry feed grouped by user,
  mark viewed, viewer list, delete — with batch author+view hydration
- MessagesModule: conversations (lexicographic participant pair), send messages,
  cursor-paginated message threads, mark-as-read, unread counts
- Register all 3 modules in AppModule; add isBookmarkedByMe to Post entity
- New DB tables: bookmarks, stories, story_views, conversations, messages

iOS (SwiftUI):
- PostCardView: bookmark button (filled/unfilled), share button with ShareSheetView
- BookmarksView + BookmarksViewModel: saved posts list with pagination
- ProfileView: "Saved Posts" navigation link for current user
- StoriesBarView: horizontal avatar scroll with gradient ring (unviewed) at feed top
- StoryViewerView: full-screen viewer with progress bars, tap nav, swipe dismiss
- StoriesViewModel: load story feed, mark as viewed
- ConversationsListView: inbox with avatar, preview, timestamp, unread badge
- MessageThreadView: chat bubbles (blue/gray), text input, 5s polling
- NewConversationView: user search to start DM
- FeedView: stories bar as first section, paperplane toolbar icon → DMs
- 14 new Swift files added to project.pbxproj

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix 5 Swift compile errors: add responseType param, iOS 16 compat

- StoriesViewModel: add responseType: [StoryGroup].self to request call
- MessageThreadViewModel: add responseType: Message.self to sendMessage call
- NewConversationView: add responseType to search and startConversation calls
- NewConversationView: replace iOS 17 navigationDestination(item:) with
  navigationDestination(isPresented:) for iOS 16 compatibility

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Messaging UX improvements and rename Restaurant to Place

- Add Message button on other users' profiles (ProfileView)
- Show followed users by default in NewConversationView
- Rename all user-facing "Restaurant" text to "Place" across 8 views

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix messaging: profile button navigation, suggested users, remove duplicate link

- Move message navigationDestination to parent ProfileView (fixes non-clickable button)
- Fetch currentUser if nil before loading followed users (fixes empty suggestions)
- Remove "Saved Posts" link from profile (keep only Check-ins link)
- Add loading spinner on Message button during API call

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Show full post cards in user check-in history

User check-in history now displays PostCardView with media, content,
like/comment counts instead of minimal check-in rows. Restaurant mode
keeps existing check-in row layout.

Resolve human-readable species names from SBML annotations and replace RoadRunner fallback with COPASI retry cascade

Extract UniProt/KEGG identifiers from SBML annotation blocks and resolve them
to proper protein/compound names via REST APIs. Clean up BioNetGen-style state
annotations and x##_ prefixes for models without annotations. Show database IDs
in hover tooltips. Replace the RoadRunner NaN fallback with a COPASI-native
retry strategy: more internal steps → RADAU5 stiff solver → looser tolerances.

commit.message:
Add word search planets thumbnail

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix Before/After view, Windows theming, tool deselection, and AI Denoise defaults

- Before/After: add sidebar margins to beforeAfterBox, show original image
  as default "Before" (history[0] instead of history[size-2]), add ipc null check
- Windows theming: fix CSS -gtk-icon-size breaking theme load on Windows GTK,
  add background-color to editor containers (#EditorViewPaned, #EditorEditBox,
  #EditorRightPaned, toolbars, #FileBrowser), white text for MaskTreeView
- Adjuster: hide spin widget for named sliders (render value via Cairo),
  remove broken gtk_container_forall calls (not a container on Windows)
- Tool deselection: auto-deselect perspective/crop tools when switching tabs
- AI Denoise: checkbox unchecked by default (require enabled && blend > 0)
- Windows CI: bundle embedded Python 3.11 with RawRefinery
- Python detection: check bundled python dir first on Windows

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

repository.name: Steep
repository.description: A modern, AI-enhanced fork of RawTherapee for professional RAW photo editing

commit.message:
Shorten search bar placeholder text

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(ci): resolve all CI failures — formatting, lint, typecheck, pre-commit hooks

- Fix prettier formatting across 27+ files
- Fix rustfmt in interpreter.rs/runtime.rs
- Add ESLint flat config with typescript-eslint
- Fix 46 unused variable lint errors across renderer
- Create apps/web/index.html for Vite build entry point
- Add --passWithNoTests to apps/web test script
- Add Husky + lint-staged pre-commit hooks to catch issues locally
- Upgrade ESLint to v10 across all packages
- Update CLAUDE.md: mark Phase 4 complete, document CI agent hooks responsibility

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

repository.name: wildcard
repository.description: The HyperCard 3.0 that Apple never shipped. An open-source web-based reimagining with WildTalk scripting, retro Mac aesthetics, and a community gallery.

commit.message:
docs: 全体フロー・サブエージェント説明追加、SQLite化、リンク修正

- シナリオ冒頭に開発の全体フロー（Phase 0〜6）を追加
- サブエージェントによるコードレビューの説明を追加
- Copilot比較表にレビュー行を追加
- DB を MySQL から SQLite に変更（シナリオ・要件定義書・EF Core tips）
- OpenAPI tips のリンクパスを修正（./tips/ → ./docs/tips/）
- 要件定義書にデザイン要件を追加
- README に Context7 MCP サーバーの説明を追加

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Learn page: shorten search bar, 15 per page, Mini Games label, trim coming soon text
